user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
**Priority:** MEDIUM
**Category:** Feature Request - Follow-up

**Draft response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

Thanks for checking in on this. I completely understand why you're following up—waiting six months for an update is a long time, and I really appreciate your patience. 

Your feature request is still open because our product team has been heavily focused on some core platform updates recently. Because of this, we haven't been able to schedule your request into our immediate development cycle yet. 

Please know that it hasn't been forgotten or dismissed. I've just added a note to the internal ticket with your follow-up to remind the product team that this is still highly requested and important to your workflow. 

While I can't give you a specific timeline for when it will be built, I'd love to help in the meantime. Could you share a bit more about the exact goal you're trying to achieve with this feature? There might be a creative workaround or an integration we can set up using our current tools. 

Let me know, I'm happy to help brainstorm!

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot fully complied with the user's request by drafting a professional, empathetic response that followed the persona's guidelines and addressed the specific scenario provided.
